logic_summary: Packaging specification referenced but file not included
recommended_action: Block final review until attachment is provided or packaging assumption is documented

logic_summary: DV/PV or customer test standard referenced but missing
recommended_action: Escalate to customer or estimate contingency

logic_summary: PPAP level above similar historical family baseline
recommended_action: Add PPAP labor, run-at-rate, and documentation cost

logic_summary: Tolerance tighter than similar family average
recommended_action: Review process capability and scrap contingency

logic_summary: Critical feature tolerance at or below 0.03 mm
recommended_action: Request feasibility review before quoting

logic_summary: Material grade materially higher than historical family
recommended_action: Check die wear, springback, and cycle impact

logic_summary: Supplier must fund gauges/check fixtures
recommended_action: Separate tooling and amortization line

logic_summary: 100 percent appearance inspection required
recommended_action: Add inspection labor and camera or manual station cost

logic_summary: Payment term exceeds historical norm
recommended_action: Review financing impact and approval

logic_summary: Annual price down exceeds historical norm
recommended_action: Model margin erosion by year

logic_summary: DDP or supplier-managed freight required
recommended_action: Add freight, customs, and volatility buffer

logic_summary: Returnable rack or special container required
recommended_action: Quote packaging investment and cycle loss

logic_summary: Premium freight recovery excluded
recommended_action: Add launch buffer or negotiate exception

logic_summary: Tooling ownership unclear or supplier-owned
recommended_action: Clarify depreciation and asset recovery

logic_summary: Special surface or burr requirements below family norm
recommended_action: Review secondary operation cost

logic_summary: Cpk target above family baseline
recommended_action: Assess extra process controls

logic_summary: Run at rate required beyond normal PPAP
recommended_action: Add machine and labor trial cost

logic_summary: Annual revalidation or corrosion retention required
recommended_action: Add recurring quality cost

logic_summary: No explicit packaging cost in template
recommended_action: Prevent release until cost assumption exists

logic_summary: No explicit quality cost in template
recommended_action: Prevent release until PPAP/inspection cost exists

logic_summary: No freight line in quote despite non-standard incoterm
recommended_action: Prevent release until freight assumption exists

logic_summary: Volume materially different from historical range
recommended_action: Recalculate labor, automation, and amortization assumptions

logic_summary: Quoted price below historical low band
recommended_action: Trigger management review for underquote risk

logic_summary: Quoted price above historical high band
recommended_action: Commercial competitiveness risk

logic_summary: Scrap or material utilization assumption missing
recommended_action: Require manufacturing estimate

logic_summary: Tooling cost field blank
recommended_action: Prevent submission

logic_summary: Appearance approval required prior to PPAP
recommended_action: Add sample timing and approval risk

logic_summary: Spec number referenced but file not found
recommended_action: Create clarification tracker
